name: pireel
description: Edit Pireel Studio videos from your coding agent: transcript-based cutting, storyboarding, designed graphics, subtitles, themes — executed live in the user's open studio browser tab.

defaultPrompt: Read the current state and tell me what's on the timeline
Clean up my talking-head: cut filler words, retakes, and rambling
One-click cut: turn this video into a first draft with graphics
Add a clean set of full-sentence captions to the whole video
interface.shortDescription: Edit Pireel Studio videos from your agent
interface.longDescription: Workflow skills and MCP server configuration for editing talking-head videos in Pireel Studio: importing local media, transcript-based speech cleanup, storyboarding with designed graphics (BYO — your model generates, Pireel validates), subtitles, themes, framing, and local export, live in the user's open studio tab or offline against the cloud project.
